title: Scripted Quote
excerpt: Had a request to script this quote by Mumford & Sons from a friend. I tried writing it several times and it looked best pretty small. I gave her the original piece, which fit into a 4x6 frame. I'm using…
body:
Had a request to script this quote by Mumford & Sons from a friend. I tried writing it several times and it looked best pretty small. I gave her the original piece, which fit into a 4x6 frame. 

I'm using this watercolor set from Michaels and I have finally tried a waterbrush and found one that I love by Tim Holtz/Ranger. If you have a favorite quote – silly, snarky or simple in its’ wisdom, please share in the comments!
